concerns.text: Missing task for 'Synthetic BMG Dataset' generator logic. Plan.md (Critical Data Contingency) and Spec.md (FR-001) require an automated fallback to generate synthetic data if the Materials Project API fails. T014 only mentions fetching or generating, but lacks a dedicated task to implement the generation logic itself, leaving the pipeline unable to run reproducibly without real data.

Task T029 (LOFO) does not cover the 'GroupKFold for small families' requirement. Spec.md (FR-008) and Plan.md (Complexity Tracking) explicitly require a hybrid approach (LOFO for large families, GroupKFold for small ones) to prevent empty folds. The current task only implements LOFO, failing to address the edge case of rare alloy families.

Task T027 implements Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test, but Spec.md (FR-007) and US2 Acceptance Scenario 3 require a 'corrected resampled t-test (Nadeau & Bengio)' or paired permutation test to account for fold dependency. Wilcoxon alone does not satisfy the specific statistical method required for comparing models with dependent folds.

Task T018 only 'flags' collinear features. Spec.md (FR-003) and Plan.md (Collinearity Control) require the pipeline to 'remove features or apply PCA' when VIF > 5. Flagging without removal/pruning leaves the model training with collinear data, violating the Data Hygiene and Model Evaluation Transparency requirements.

Task T015 mandates recording checksums to 'state/ingest.yaml'. Constitution.md (Principle V) and Plan.md (Versioning Discipline) require a single canonical 'state/projects/PROJ-380-...yaml' file for artifact tracking. Creating a separate 'ingest.yaml' fragments the versioning state, violating the Single Source of Truth principle.
